Aberration.name: Aberration
traits: Darkvision out to 60 feet
Proficient with natural weapons; if humanoid in form, proficient with all simple weapons and any weapon described in entry
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Aberrations eat, sleep, and breathe

Animal.name: Animal
traits: Intelligence score of 1 or 2
Low-light vision
Alignment: Always neutral
Treasure: None
Proficient with natural weapons only; noncombative herbivores use natural weapons as secondary attacks
Proficient with no armor unless trained for war
Animals eat, sleep, and breathe

Construct.name: Construct
traits: No Constitution score
Low-light vision
Darkvision out to 60 feet
Immunity to all mind-affecting effects (charms, compulsions, phantasms, patterns, and morale effects)
Immunity to poison, sleep effects, paralysis, stunning, disease, death effects, and necromancy effects
Cannot heal damage on their own, but can often be repaired or via Craft Construct feat; fast healing still works
Not subject to critical hits, nonlethal damage, ability damage, ability drain, fatigue, exhaustion, or energy drain
Immunity to any effect that requires a Fortitude save (unless the effect also works on objects, or is harmless)
Not at risk of death from massive damage; immediately destroyed when reduced to 0 hit points or less
Cannot be raised or resurrected
Gains bonus hit points based on size (Small 10, Medium 20, Large 30, Huge 40, Gargantuan 60, Colossal 80)
Proficient with natural weapons only; if humanoid in form, proficient with any weapon in entry
Proficient with no armor
Constructs do not eat, sleep, or breathe

Dragon.name: Dragon
traits: Darkvision out to 60 feet and low-light vision
Immunity to magic sleep effects and paralysis effects
Proficient with natural weapons only; if humanoid in form, proficient with all simple weapons and any weapons in entry
Proficient with no armor
Dragons eat, sleep, and breathe

Elemental.name: Elemental
traits: Darkvision out to 60 feet
Immunity to poison, sleep effects, paralysis, and stunning
Not subject to critical hits or flanking
No dual nature; soul and body form one unit; cannot be raised, reincarnated, or resurrected (requires limited wish, wish, miracle, or true resurrection)
Proficient with natural weapons only; if humanoid in form, proficient with all simple weapons and any weapons in entry
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Elementals do not eat, sleep, or breathe

Fey.name: Fey
traits: Low-light vision
Proficient with all simple weapons and any weapons mentioned in entry
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Fey eat, sleep, and breathe

Giant.name: Giant
traits: Low-light vision
Proficient with all simple and martial weapons, as well as any natural weapons
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Giants eat, sleep, and breathe

Humanoid.name: Humanoid
Humanoid.good_saves_note: Usually Reflex; a humanoid's good save varies
traits: Proficient with all simple weapons, or by character class
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types, or by character class; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Humanoids breathe, eat, and sleep

Magical Beast.name: Magical Beast
traits: Darkvision out to 60 feet and low-light vision
Proficient with natural weapons only
Proficient with no armor
Magical beasts eat, sleep, and breathe

Monstrous Humanoid.name: Monstrous Humanoid
traits: Darkvision out to 60 feet
Proficient with all simple weapons and any weapons mentioned in entry
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Monstrous humanoids eat, sleep, and breathe

Ooze.name: Ooze
traits: Mindless: No Intelligence score, and immunity to all mind-affecting effects (charms, compulsions, phantasms, patterns, and morale effects)
Blind (but have blindsight), with immunity to gaze attacks, visual effects, illusions, and other attack forms that rely on sight
Immunity to poison, sleep effects, paralysis, polymorph, and stunning
Some oozes deal acid damage to objects (10 + 1/2 HD + Con modifier per full round of contact)
Not subject to critical hits or flanking
Proficient with natural weapons only
Proficient with no armor
Oozes eat and breathe, but do not sleep

Outsider.name: Outsider
traits: Darkvision out to 60 feet

No dual nature; soul and body form one unit; cannot be raised, reincarnated, or resurrected (requires limited wish, wish, miracle, or true resurrection); native subtype outsiders can be raised normally
Proficient with all simple and martial weapons and any weapons mentioned in entry
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Outsiders breathe, but do not need to eat or sleep (although they can); native outsiders breathe, eat, and sleep

Plant.name: Plant
traits: Low-light vision
Immunity to all mind-affecting effects (charms, compulsions, phantasms, patterns, and morale effects)
Immunity to poison, sleep effects, paralysis, polymorph, and stunning
Not subject to critical hits
Proficient with natural weapons only
Proficient with no armor
Plants breathe and eat, but do not sleep

Undead.name: Undead
traits: No Constitution score
Darkvision out to 60 feet
Immunity to all mind-affecting effects (charms, compulsions, phantasms, patterns, and morale effects)
Immunity to poison, sleep effects, paralysis, stunning, disease, and death effects
Not subject to critical hits, nonlethal damage, ability drain, or energy drain; immune to damage to physical ability scores (Str, Dex, Con), fatigue, and exhaustion
Cannot heal damage on its own if it has no Intelligence score, although it can be healed; negative energy can heal undead
Immunity to any effect that requires a Fortitude save (unless the effect also works on objects or is harmless)
Uses Charisma modifier for Concentration checks
Not at risk of death from massive damage; immediately destroyed when reduced to 0 hit points or less
Not affected by raise dead and reincarnate; resurrection and true resurrection turn undead back into living creatures
Proficient with natural weapons, all simple weapons, and any weapons mentioned in entry
Proficient with described armor type and all lighter types; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor
Undead do not breathe, eat, or sleep

Vermin.name: Vermin
traits: Mindless: No Intelligence score, and immunity to all mind-affecting effects (charms, compulsions, phantasms, patterns, and morale effects)
Darkvision out to 60 feet
Proficient with natural weapons only
Proficient with no armor
Vermin breathe, eat, and sleep

Air.name: Air
traits: Usually used for elementals and outsiders with a connection to the Elemental Plane of Air
Always have fly speeds
Usually have perfect maneuverability

Aquatic.name: Aquatic
traits: Always have swim speeds; can move in water without making Swim checks
Can breathe underwater
Cannot breathe air unless it has the amphibious special quality

Chaotic.name: Chaotic
traits: Usually applied only to outsiders native to the chaotic-aligned Outer Planes
Any effect that depends on alignment affects the creature as if it has a chaotic alignment
Overcomes damage reduction as if natural weapons and wielded weapons were chaotic-aligned

Cold.name: Cold
traits: Immunity to cold
Vulnerability to fire (+50% damage)

Earth.name: Earth
traits: Usually used for elementals and outsiders with a connection to the Elemental Plane of Earth
Usually have burrow speeds
Most earth creatures can burrow through solid rock

Evil.name: Evil
traits: Usually applied only to outsiders native to the evil-aligned Outer Planes; also called fiends
Any effect that depends on alignment affects the creature as if it has an evil alignment
Overcomes damage reduction as if natural weapons and wielded weapons were evil-aligned

Extraplanar.name: Extraplanar
traits: Applied to any creature when it is on a plane other than its native plane
Can be gained or lost as a creature travels between planes
Creatures not labeled as extraplanar are natives of the Material Plane and gain this subtype if they leave
No creature has the extraplanar subtype on a transitive plane (Astral, Ethereal, Shadow)

Fire.name: Fire
traits: Immunity to fire
Vulnerability to cold (+50% damage)

Goblinoid.name: Goblinoid
traits: Stealthy humanoids who live by hunting and raiding
All speak Goblin

Good.name: Good
traits: Usually applied only to outsiders native to the good-aligned Outer Planes
Any effect that depends on alignment affects the creature as if it has a good alignment
Overcomes damage reduction as if natural weapons and wielded weapons were good-aligned

Incorporeal.name: Incorporeal
traits: Has no physical body
Can be harmed only by other incorporeal creatures, magic weapons, and spells/spell-like/supernatural abilities
Immune to all nonmagical attack forms
50% chance to ignore any damage from a corporeal source (except positive energy, negative energy, force effects, or ghost touch weapons)
No natural armor bonus; has a deflection bonus equal to Charisma bonus (minimum +1)
Can enter or pass through solid objects but must remain adjacent to exterior
Attacks pass through (ignore) natural armor, armor, and shields; deflection bonuses and force effects work normally
Cannot fall or take falling damage
Cannot make trip or grapple attacks, nor be tripped or grappled
No Strength score; Dexterity modifier applies to both melee and ranged attacks
Moves silently; cannot be heard with Listen checks unless it wishes to be

Lawful.name: Lawful
traits: Usually applied only to outsiders native to the lawful-aligned Outer Planes
Any effect that depends on alignment affects the creature as if it has a lawful alignment
Overcomes damage reduction as if natural weapons and wielded weapons were lawful-aligned

Native.name: Native
traits: Applied only to outsiders
Have mortal ancestors or a strong connection to the Material Plane
Can be raised, reincarnated, or resurrected just as other living creatures
Native to the Material Plane
Unlike true outsiders, native outsiders need to eat and sleep

Reptilian.name: Reptilian
traits: Scaly and usually cold-blooded
Only used to describe a set of humanoid races, not all animals and monsters that are truly reptiles

Shapechanger.name: Shapechanger
traits: Has the supernatural ability to assume one or more alternate forms
Proficient with natural weapons, simple weapons, and any weapons mentioned in entry
Proficient with any armor mentioned in entry and all lighter forms; proficient with shields if proficient with any armor

Swarm.name: Swarm
traits: A collection of Fine, Diminutive, or Tiny creatures that acts as a single creature
Has a single pool of Hit Dice, hit points, initiative modifier, speed, and Armor Class
Occupies a 10-foot square (nonflying) or cube (flying); reach is 0 feet
Not subject to critical hits or flanking
Swarm of Tiny creatures takes half damage from slashing and piercing weapons
Swarm of Fine or Diminutive creatures is immune to all weapon damage
Cannot be tripped, grappled, or bull rushed; cannot grapple an opponent
Immune to any spell or effect that targets a specific number of creatures (except mind-affecting if it has Int and hive mind)
Takes +50% damage from area-effect spells and effects
Deals automatic damage to creatures in its space (no attack roll needed); damage scales with HD
Distraction (Ex): Living creatures vulnerable to swarm damage nauseated for 1 round (Fort negates)

Water.name: Water
traits: Usually used for elementals and outsiders with a connection to the Elemental Plane of Water
Always have swim speeds; can move in water without making Swim checks
Can breathe underwater and usually can breathe air as well
